WedShoots

All your wedding photos in one special album
Let's begin!

Privacy is paramount

Keep your wedding photos as private as you like. Manage and change your album settings as needed.

Your photos in high quality

You can download your entire wedding album complete with photos and videos in full resolution.

Don't chase after photos

Don't waste time chasing guests for their photos, you'll already have them all in your album!

How does it work?

Create your album Join or use your Hitched account to start sharing memories. Share the code with your guests Join or use your Hitched account to start sharing memories. Download the app and start adding photos! Encourage your wedding guests to add photos and videos to the app. You can download your album in hi-resolution anytime.

Create your album

Don't chase after photos

Everything you need is right here. Enjoy every moment.
